name: Reincarnated Into Another World
description:
In this high-fantasy otome RPG, you're isekai-ed into another world. Your mission is to make one of the character fall in love or create a reverse harem if you wanted!

Main male lead from the left: Lazor von Pyre, Aerys Velgaeron, Isaac Alastair, Eliasz Gilbert.
